# Description

Summary of the changes and the problem they solve.

## Type of change

- [ ] Fix (bug / typo / inconsistency)
- [ ] New section or feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Configuration / maintenance

## Changes made

**Before**: how it was.

**After**: how it is now.

## Checklist

- [ ] Follows the existing style and structure
- [ ] Self-review completed
- [ ] Links and examples verified
- [ ] Updated the `CHANGELOG.md` (if applicable)

## Related issues

Closes #

## Notes for reviewers

Specific areas that need attention or decisions made.
